context: Tests whether Swift Testing advanced API guidance names current spelling, toolchain gates, and runtime platform limits.

checklist.name: Exit-test spelling
checklist.description: Replaces stale #expect(exitsWith:) with #expect(processExitsWith:) and awaits the macro.

checklist.name: Exit-test availability
checklist.description: States that exit testing requires Swift 6.2 / Xcode 26.0 or newer and is not supported on iOS, tvOS, or watchOS runtime targets.

checklist.name: Exit-test capture values
checklist.description: Mentions Swift 6.3 capture-list requirements when discussing captured parent-process values in exit tests.

checklist.name: Test.cancel shape and gate
checklist.description: Marks the Test.cancel sample async throws when it awaits work and explains Test.cancel requires Swift 6.3 / Xcode 26.4-era support.

checklist.name: Warning issue recording
checklist.description: Uses Issue.record(..., severity: .warning), explains warning severity does not fail the test, and names Swift 6.3 / Xcode 26.4-era support.

checklist.name: Image attachment recording
checklist.description: Uses Attachment.record(image, named: ..., as: .png), names supported iOS image types or relevant imports, and names Swift 6.3 / Xcode 26.4-era support.
